import type { NavigateOptions } from './link' import type { RegisteredRouter } from './router' export type UseNavigateResult<TDefaultFrom extends string> = < TRouter extends RegisteredRouter, TTo extends string | undefined, TFrom extends string = TDefaultFrom, TMaskFrom extends string = TFrom, TMaskTo extends string = '', >({ from, ...rest }: NavigateOptions<TRouter, TFrom, TTo, TMaskFrom, TMaskTo>) => Promise<void>
